name: Monitoring Stack
description: Prometheus + Grafana monitoring stack. Pre-configured dashboards for Proxmox, Docker, and system metrics.

commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates gnupg
apt-get update && apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin

mkdir -p /opt/monitoring && cat > /opt/monitoring/docker-compose.yml << 'EOF'
services:
  prometheus:
    image: prom/prometheus:latest
    restart: always
    ports:
      - '9090:9090'
    volumes:
      - ./prometheus:/etc/prometheus
      - prometheus_data:/prometheus
  grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    restart: always
    ports:
      - '3000:3000'
    volumes:
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
    environment:
      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD: 'changeme'
volumes:
  prometheus_data:
  grafana_data:
EOF
post_create.notes: Grafana at http://CONTAINER_IP:3000 (admin/changeme). Prometheus at http://CONTAINER_IP:9090.
